Vocabulary - विशिष्टः कृषिकः | Story 19

23 May 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
पुरतः in front
स्थित्वा having stood
स्वेद sweating / toiling
आततायिन् warrior
इच्छति wish / desire
आदौ initially / at the beginning
कोपेन out of anger
उच्चैः in loud voice
शकट cart / carriage
कर्षति plough

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
यथा भवान् इच्छति As you wish.
अपि एषः नाम फलम् इच्छति? Perhaps this man wants a reward?
कटुयुक्तं खाद्यं सा न इच्छति एव She does not like spicy food at all.
भवती तम् इच्छति खलु? You like him, don’t you?
   
सा अङ्गुलीयकं कोपेन विक्षिप्तवति Angrily she threw out the ring

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
